name: Claim denied cuz 'not serious' in Holladay, fight it?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied cuz 'not serious' in Holladay, fight it?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, appeal; 'seriousness' irrelevant for eligibility.**[5]

Comp covers all work injuries; minor ones qualify for treatment.

- Refile with doctor proof.
- 20-day appeal window.
- Hearing proves work link.

Attorney overturns 70% denials.
